fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact to which you assign a mailing group.

fields.name: Mailing Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the mailing group code. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact to which you assign a mailing group.

fields.name: Contact Company Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact company. If the contact you assign the mailing group is a person, this field contains the name of the company for which the contact works.

fields.name: Mailing Group Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the mailing group you have chosen to assign the contact.
